Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel- Civil
Off Calendar Mar-23-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Garen Nazarian of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing on behalf of Brayton Purcell LLP and Nancy T. Williams
RULING:
BRAYTON PURCELL LLP, NANCY T. WILLIAMS' MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Brayton Purcell LLP, Nancy T. Williams' motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Mark Korgan is granted. Counsel demonstrated she provided Mr. Korgan with proper notice of the motion and no opposition was filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Reporter: Kimberly R. Hendershott of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12552 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/CML)
